meta.intent: Force first-clear priority between the lower puppy that is near the coming water and the upper-right puppy that looks cleaner to rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Rescue the lower puppy first even though the upper-right puppy looks more open, then pivot across the board to finish the safer rescue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player saves the easier upper-right puppy first, spends too many actions away from the lower route, and risks losing the lower puppy to water.
meta.whatItProves: By Level 3, rescue order is the puzzle.
meta.notes: The urgent puppy now sits on the first flood row, with two compact route groups that must be taken before the safer upper-right rescue.
